initiatives.title: Generative AI Teams portal
initiatives.description: NAU makes a Generative AI @ NAU Microsoft Teams portal available for faculty and staff questions and campus discussion.
initiatives.significance: Shows an R1 institution moving AI into governed practice, research capacity, teaching, or workforce preparation.

investment.description: No public dollar amount found in cited source.

initiatives.title: Microsoft Copilot access and FY26 licensing
initiatives.description: NAU ITS says users can log into Microsoft Copilot with NAU credentials for enterprise data protection, and that Copilot for Microsoft 365 is available to NAU users as an extended license at $372 per user per year in FY26. Copilot Studio access is available by request for developing tailored chatbots and AI tools.
initiatives.significance: The Copilot page gives a concrete platform-access signal and a rare public per-user AI license price, even though total license counts are not disclosed.

investment.funding_source: Northern Arizona University units or users
investment.description: NAU publishes FY26 Copilot for Microsoft 365 pricing of $372 per user per year, but total license count and total spend are not public.

collaborations.description: Microsoft Copilot and Copilot Studio are the named platform and agent-building tools.

tools_and_vendors.name: Microsoft Copilot
tools_and_vendors.role: AI assistant available through NAU credential login

tools_and_vendors.name: Copilot Studio
tools_and_vendors.role: Requested license for creating tailored AI chatbots and agents

initiatives.policy_implications: NAU directs users to sign in with NAU credentials for data protection and to avoid entering university data while logged out.

narrative_summary: Northern Arizona University shows an AI posture with five documented initiatives across 5 categories. The evidence emphasizes Provost AI initiatives, Academic AI resources, and Generative AI Teams portal. Policy maturity is coded as comprehensive based on public guidance, privacy language, governance, or tool controls. The profile also records teaching, research, workforce, equity, or enterprise-tool activity where sources support it. Leadership names, enrollment, GPU counts, and contract values are left null when not found in the cited public sources.

gaps_acknowledged: Leadership names and enrollment were not populated in this missing-only sweep.
Monsoon GPU count and Copilot FY26 per-user pricing are public, but total Copilot license counts and total AI spend are not public.
No public student subgroup outcome metrics for AI initiatives were found in reviewed sources.
No controversy record was added without a reliable institution-specific source.

strategic_archetype.rationale: Primary archetype selected from visible public signals: governance led.

products: Copilot for Microsoft 365 and Copilot Studio
